articles.title: 나는 숫자가 아니다 – 72,000명 이상의 팔레스타인 희생자를 추모하며

articles.title: Lemonade by AMD: GPU와 NPU를 활용한 빠른 오픈소스 로컬 LLM 서버
articles.summary:
• AMD 지원 로컬 AI 서버로, GPU와 NPU를 활용해 텍스트·이미지·음성을 빠르게 처리하는 오픈소스 플랫폼

articles.title: Steam의 리눅스 사용률이 3월에 5%를 돌파

articles.title: Amazon hits sellers with ‘fuel surcharge’ as Iran war roils global energy markets
articles.summary: The e-commerce giant called the surcharge "temporary" but couldn't give a date for when the policy would be retired.

articles.title: Telehealth giant Hims & Hers says its customer support system was hacked
articles.summary: The U.S. telehealth giant says hackers stole customer support ticket data over the course of several days in February.

articles.title: Artemis II is NASA’s last moon mission without Silicon Valley
articles.summary: Next time around, the pressure will be on SpaceX and Blue Origin.

articles.title: Gateway Capital announces first close of $25M Fund II
articles.summary: Gateway Capital, the Milwaukee-based venture firm founded by Dana Guthrie, can now begin investment operations for its $25M Fund II.

articles.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show
articles.summary: TBPN, Silicon Valley's cult-favorite tech podcast, will operate independently, even as it's overseen by chief political operative Chris Lehane.
